mapper.select: SELECT id, order_no AS orderNo, residence_id AS residenceId, bill_id AS billId, subject, total_amount AS totalAmount, pay_channel AS payChannel, status, trade_no AS tradeNo, pay_time AS payTime, notify_time AS notifyTime, client_ip AS clientIp, extra, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM pay_order WHERE order_no = #{orderNo} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE pay_order SET status = 2, trade_no = #{tradeNo}, pay_time = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE order_no = #{orderNo} AND status <> 2
